# Conductor Playground — Genesis Conductor

> Experimental playground for Genesis Conductor development.
> Testing ground for AI Architecture patterns by Igor Holt.

## Purpose
- Prototype new Genesis Conductor features
- Test A2A protocol implementations
- Experiment with MCP server patterns
